summary: Implemented the Permission Debt module (US-023). Created format-permissions.ts helper mapping raw PermissionCheckResult[] to display rows with human-readable labels (geolocation→Location, etc.) and state values. Created permission-debt-module.ts with async render function that calls checkPermissions(), calculates debt score, builds a receipt card showing Notifications, Camera, Microphone, Clipboard, and Location rows with state badges, displays the debt score prominently, and includes explanatory text about permission debt risk. Added scoped CSS with design token integration and reduced-motion support. Wired module into main.ts dashboard. Fixed pre-existing test type error in makeMixedPermissions and added vi.clearAllMocks() to prevent mock call count accumulation across tests. All checks pass: lint, typecheck, 415/415 tests.
